summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that allows AI agents to be triggered by external events from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other providers.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented the webhooks feature end-to-end: new `moltis-webhooks` crate with store, auth, profiles, worker; gateway RPC integration; HTTP ingress endpoint; settings UI; documentation; website updates; test script; and multiple bug fixes from PR review.

repo: Settings sidebar nav icons are NOT rendered via the JS `icon` property — they use CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` with `[data-section='X']` attribute selectors
There are TWO style.css files: `src/assets/style.css` (Tailwind output) and `src/assets/css/style.css` (separate compiled CSS for components) — both are served and used
Icon mask SVGs use stroke-only paths (no fill) for the mask-image system — this is valid and renders correctly via currentColor background
The `Arc::get_mut` pattern for post-construction field injection silently fails if the Arc was already cloned elsewhere; OnceLock is the correct solution for late initialization on a shared Arc
The i18n build uses a string-replacement script (`website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs`) that regenerates all language HTML files from the English template

Webhook dedup uses SHA-256 body hash as fallback in generic profile — this causes aggressive dedup for identical test payloads; removed body-hash fallback so dedup only activates on explicit delivery ID headers
Chat UI doesn't live-refresh when background workers append to an open named session — requires a WebSocket broadcast from the worker post-send (affects both webhooks and cron)
The `components.css` file is NOT gitignored and IS committed (unlike the Tailwind `style.css` output)

code.finding: Arc::get_mut fails silently when Arc was already cloned — webhook_store and webhook_worker_tx were never set, causing 404 on all ingress requests
Original two-RwLock design had TOCTOU gap: global checked then released, per-webhook checked then released, then both recorded — replaced with single Mutex for atomic check-and-record
String slice truncation with [..500] panics on multibyte UTF-8 boundaries — added truncate_str() helper in normalize.rs that walks back to char boundary
HeaderValue::from_static().try_into() produces irrefutable if let pattern warning — use from_static() directly
Crash recovery SQL query for unprocessed deliveries must include 'processing' status, not just 'received' and 'queued' — processing deliveries were orphaned on restart
Auth secrets in auth_config and source_config were returned in API responses — added Webhook::redacted() method and applied at gateway service layer before returning to clients

workflow: Use OnceLock instead of Arc::get_mut for late field initialization on shared Arcs — get_mut is fragile and fails silently
Browser-based HTTP tools (Hoppscotch web) cannot reach localhost with self-signed certs due to CORS and mixed-content restrictions — recommend desktop app or curl instead
CORS headers on ingress endpoints need to be added to EVERY response path, not just the success path — wrapping at the end of handler is the cleanest approach
HTM JSX collapses whitespace between text and elements across newlines — use ${' '} or ${'\u00a0'} for explicit spaces between adjacent elements
beads CLI can create issues with: beads issue create --title '...' --description '...' --priority p1

friction: Arc::get_mut silently returning None caused webhook_store to never be set — all ingress requests returned 404 with no error logged, very hard to diagnose
Two style.css files with different contents caused confusion about which one the dev server serves
CSS nav icon system is completely undocumented — icon property in JS sections array is unused, real icons are in components.css ::before rules
Hoppscotch web cannot test localhost endpoints — the recommendation to use it was misleading without the desktop app caveat
OAuth token expired at session start, causing initial confusion before retry
Pre-existing compile error in moltis-httpd (vault/ssh_routes feature) added noise to compilation checks throughout the session
HTM whitespace collapsing between text nodes required an obscure workaround for a simple space character
open_items: Live-refresh of chat UI when background workers append messages to open named sessions (filed as moltis-2pu) — affects both webhooks and cron
Provider-specific response tools (post GitHub comments, merge PRs, issue Stripe refunds) are defined in the plan but not yet implemented — currently agents can only read webhook data
CIDR allowlist enforcement is implemented in the handler but needs real-world testing with proxied deployments (X-Forwarded-For trust)
Translations for webhook feature text in non-English website language files are still in English
GitLab and Stripe profiles have basic event normalization but lack the full entity key and payload normalization depth of the GitHub profile
The webhook worker uses a fixed-size pool but per-entity locking (to serialize events for the same PR/issue) is not yet implemented
Webhook response actions audit table exists in the schema but the response tool injection pipeline is not yet wired
